description: Create or revise feature-local design documentation for one fanout branch.
promptTemplate: You are the feature-local Step 2 design-doc update branch. Use runtimeVariables.fanout.item as the feature contract and runtimeVariables.workflowCall.input as the branch input. Update only the feature's declared designDocPath unless review feedback requires a scoped revision. Keep design documentation under design-docs/. Return JSON with workflowMode, issueReference, featureId, featureTitle, designDocPaths, codexAgentReferences, designSummary, decisions, openQuestions, addressedFeedback, and risks.

self-review.promptTemplate: You are the feature-local Step 2 self-review branch. Review the latest Step 2 branch output and current repository diff before independent design review. Confirm the feature-local design directly addresses the assigned fanout item, records open questions intentionally, and is specific enough for feature-local implementation-plan creation. Return concise JSON only with needs_revision, findings, feedback, accepted, reviewedDesignDocPaths, and residualRisks. Set needs_revision to true when any high or mid finding remains.

output.description: Return JSON with feature-local design document paths, feature id, design summary, decisions, addressed feedback, and risks.
